bird.name: Field sparrow
bird.summary: The field sparrow (Spizella pusilla) is a small New World sparrow in the family Passerellidae. It is about 140 mm (6 in) long and weighs ab…

relations.evidence: Chalif |publisher=Houghton Mifflin Harcourt |year=1999 |isbn=978-0-395-97514-5 |access-date=2023-11-08 |archive-date=2023-11-08 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231108072318/https://books.google.com/books?id=LLU8tgLU1uMC&pg=PA255#v=onepage&q&f=false |url-status=live }} The typical habitat of this bird is bushy country with shrubs and grassland
